raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "More than 20% of California’s energy generation comes from solar energy.",
    "California is ranked the highest in the nation in solar power generation.",
    "A sizable portion of Californians are unable to access the benefits of solar technology.",
    "Many home and business owners are unable to install solar panels due to cost or structural challenges.",
    "Roughly 45% of California households are renters who cannot install a solar system on their own.",
    "Community solar projects allow multiple customers to subscribe and receive credit on their monthly energy bills.",
    "The legislation aims to create opportunities for energy customers to save money on their energy bills.",
    "The legislation would support the development of cost-effective community solar plus storage systems in California.",
    "The proposed program would provide renters and customers unable to install a solar system with an option to benefit from solar energy."
  ]
}
```
